category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a TUI for exploring crates.io; official GitHub README says crates-tui is a terminal user interface explorer for crates.io: https://github.com/ratatui/crates-tui#readme
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is crates-tui; official repository and README heading use crates-tui: https://github.com/ratatui/crates-tui
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface with install, features, screenshots, and configuration links: https://github.com/ratatui/crates-tui#readme
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/ratatui/crates-tui, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify a Ratatui-based crates.io terminal explorer with cargo/docs/browser workflows: https://github.com/ratatui/crates-tui#readme
